sub_topics.title: Kulipula Phami (Debate)
competences: Engage in debates on various topics.

instructional_blocks.hook: Kutangisa mwana waphwevo kwenyeka mali. Unetava tahi nyi chiku?
teacher_steps: Ahane vihande kuli valongi.
Guide learners on debate structure (introduction, argumentation, rebuttal, conclusion).
Facilitate debate sessions ensuring balanced participation.
learner_steps: Form debate teams (proposing team, opposing team, judges).
Listen to opposing arguments and formulate rebuttals.
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kushimutwila chakuhichila mukulipula jiphami chapwa jila imwe yakuhishilamo vishinganyeka vyavalongi. Kulipula jiphami chasakiwa mazavu atatu. Lisavu lyavakakwitavila chihande, likwavo lyavaze vanakuhamika kaha lizavu lyamakumishilo lyapwa lyavachambamilonga.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kulipula jiphami yapwa jila imwe yakushimutwila ize eji kukafwa vathu vavali chipwe mazavu avali kuhanjika hamitwe yavihande yakulihandununa. Chapwa chuma chakweulula valongi ulemu watwama hakushimutwila.

vocabulary.definition: To debate; formal discussion where opposing arguments are presented

questions: Vihande vyavyashi vanalipikilavyo jiphami mujila yakutesamo.

sub_topics.title: Lumbunwiso yamazu (Vocabulary - Word meanings)
competences: Use vocabulary correctly according to standard.

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vavuluke miyachi yavaishi vathachikiza
teacher_steps: Ahane mazu kuli valongi
Alweze valongi kushimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu navahane
Alweze valongi kulumbununa mazu
Alweze valongi kuzachisa mazu vanashimutwila mukutunga mikuku
learner_steps: Vashimutwile mazu akusakula vanavahane kuli mulongeshi
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Miyachi yavayishi: Twaminyina valongi kushimutwila nakuvuluka Miyachi yavayishi yakufwana nge tupepe, vakhele, vakhundu, mikunga…

sub_topics.short_notes: Lumbunwiso yamazu yapwa kulinangula majina amavulu veji kuzachisanga vathu, kaha majina khana awa akwechi jilumbunwiso yakulihandunuka.

questions: Hana lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka najila vanawazachishilamo mumikuku

sub_topics.title: Kutanga Nakwivwishisa (Reading with Comprehension)
competences: Kutanga nakwivwishisa mikanda yakulihandununa kweseka naseteko yavo.
Read and comprehend different types of texts according to standard.

instructional_blocks.hook: Tanga chimbwa chamujimbu nakulamuna kaha hula valongi vambulule chihande chivene chili muchimbwa unatange
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mikanda
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula
Alweze valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi kusononona mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Chapwa kutanga mujimbu kanawa chakuzeneka kukikichila. Cheji kukafwa vakakutanga kwivwishisa mujimbu vanakutanga. Vatela kutanga nakulamuna. Valongi vatela kutangila helu. Vatela kutanga washi-washi.

sub_topics.short_notes: KUSHIMUTWILA: Kushimutwila chawahila nge muli muvavali chipwe muvavulu. Muthu umwe kuhasa kushimutwila ukha wenyi chiku. Kushimutwila mujila yamwenemwene cheji kutunga usendo nakukafwa vathu kulipangila vishinganyeka vyavo navakwavo chipwe navathu veka vaze kawalithachikiza navoko.

questions: Kumbulula vihula vyamiyachi yakulihandununa kufuma hamujimbu

sub_topics.title: Kutangila helu (Fluent Reading)
competences: Kutanga nakulamuna miyachi yamikanda yaseteko yavo yakulisezaseza
Read fluently various texts according to standard

instructional_blocks.hook: Mulongeshi asoneke mukuku halivaya nakulweza longi umwe atange uze mukuku helu
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatangile helu, washi-washi nakulamuna
Alweze valongi kukumbulula vihula mukuhanjika
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kutanga nakulamuna: Chapwa kutanga mujimbu kanawa chakuzeneka kukikichila. Cheji kukafwa vakakutanga kwivwishisa mujimbu vanakutanga. Vatela kutanga nakulamuna. Valongi vatela kutangila helu. Vatela kutanga washi-washi.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kutangila helu nakulamuna chapwa uhashi wakumanyi mujila ize valongi vanahase kwitavisa nawa kutanga mikanda yakulihandununa shipwe kuswikako.

vocabulary.definition: To read correctly with proper pronunciation

questions: Hana mujimbu kuli valongi vatangile helu nakulamuna

sub_topics.title: Chambulwilo (Narrative Writing)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hana mapapilo amivwimbimbi uhule valongi mijimbu vanahase kwambulula hamivwimbimwbi vene ize
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kushimutwila tuthachikijilo nawalo wachambulwilo chakutaka nechi chamuchano
Lweza valongi vahandunune kwambulula chakutaka nakwambulula chamuchano
Alweze valongi kusoneka chaulo chachambulwilo (kutaka)
learner_steps: Vashimutwile tuthachikijilo nawalo wachambulwilo chakutaka nechi chamuchano
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Chambulwilo chapwa chaulo chambulula chipwe kwaula mijimbu yamuchano chipwe mijimbu yakutaka. Chaulo echi chatela kupwa na mutwe wachihande. Mukwambulula, sakula kuzachisa vathu, tunyama, vaishi chipwe majina amitondo aze nausaka apwenga mumujimbu wove.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kwambulula mijimbu chapwa chuma chakumanyi mujila ize muthu eji kuhasa kutaka chipwe kwambulula mijimbu yamuchano. Mitwe yavihande imwe ikwechi lumbunwiso yakujimina neyi yaheluhelu.

questions: Hula valongi vasoneke mijimbu yamuchano namijimbu yakutaka

sub_topics.title: Walo Wamajina (Types of Nouns)

teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vashimutwile walo wamajina
Alweze valongi kuhandununa majina muvihanda vyawo (kaputu nashina)
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Majina apwa mazu aze tweji kuzachisanga kuluka chipwe kuvuluka vyuma. Majina akwechi vihanda vivali; kaputu nashina. Kaputu kakwechi mulimo wako kaha shina nawa ikwechi mulimo wayo.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kaputu veji kukazachisa kusolola kukeha, kuvula hohamwe nakalemesa. Shina veji kuyisoneka kuputuka nakamukila kamufunda kunyima yacho kulumbununa nge kuli chimbwa chalizu vanahase kuhakako.

sub_topics.title: Tushilikilo (Riddles)

teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kushimutwila lumbunwiso nazachiso yatushilikilo
Lweza valongi vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Lweza valongi vatombole tushilikilo twakuzachisa mujila jimwe
Alweze valongi vatombole jila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
learner_steps: Vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Vatombole jila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Tushilikilo twapwa hanjikiso yakujimina. Mazu veji kuzachisanga mutushilikilo akwechi lumbununwiso yacho yakulihandunuka nakulumbunwiso yakashilikilo kaze.

sub_topics.short_notes: TUSHILIKILO: Tushilikilo twapwa hanjikiso yakujimina. Mazu veji kuzachisanga mutushilikilo akwechi lumbununwiso yacho yakulihandunuka nakulumbunwiso yakashilikilo kaze.

questions: Hana jila jimwe kulivalongi uvahule tushilikilo vatela kuzachisa
Hana tushilikilo tumwe kuli valongi uvahule jila vazachishilamo tushilikilo khana vaze

sub_topics.title: Jijila Jakwalumwinamo Mujimbu (Translation Methods)
competences: Kuzachisa jijila jakwalumwinamo mijimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufumisa mu Luvale nakutwala mu English

instructional_blocks.hook: Longi umwe ahanjike mukuku mulilimi limwe kaha vakwavo valumune uze mukuku mulilimi likwavo
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumune mujimbu kweseka najila jakwalumwinamo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Atela kweulula valongi hajijila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu. Anukisa valongi kwanuka jila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kwalumuna mujimbu chapwa chuma chakumanyi ize muthu eji kutwalanga mazu kufuma mulilimi limwe nakulitwala mulilimi likwavo, chikumanyi ngana ngwenyi lumbunwiso yamujimbu kainalumbuka.

sub_topics.title: Mijimbu Yakutaka (Fiction Stories)
competences: Jimbula mijimbu yakutaka hamitwe yavihande vanakuhane

instructional_blocks.hook: Mbwanda na kapeza valikwachile usepa, ukalu muka walingishile uze usepa wavo ufwenga?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vahandunune mijimbu yakutaka neyi yamuchano
Lweza valongi vambulule mijimbu yakutaka
Lweza valongi vambulule mijimbu yamuchano
Lweza valongi tuthachikijilo nasonekelo ya mijimbu
Alweze valongi vahunanane hanganyo yamijimbu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Mijimbu yakutaka yapwa vishinganyeka vize mwahana muthu vyakuzeneka kupwa naunjiho hamwe nahane mujimbu wahafuma chiselele kulijinda na kasumbi. Mijimbu yangana yeji kunangula vathu kukwachilako mangana.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kwambula mijimbu yapwa jila imwe ize vathu vechi kulinangwilangamo vyuma vyakulisezaseza mukatwamino kavo. Kuli mijimbu yakusoneka namijimbu yakuhanjika mukanwa. Mijimbu yapwa mumiyachi ivali, kuli mijimbu yakutaka namijimbu yamuchano.

sub_topics.title: Kulumbununa Mazu (Explaining Word Meanings)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vawane lizu lyalifwana na musenge
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu vanasakula
Lweza valongi vahane lumbunwiso yamazu
Lweza valongi vazachise mazu akusakula mumikuka
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lweza valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso ya mazu. Lweza valongi vahane lumbunwiso ya mazu. Lweza valongi vazachise lumbunwiso ya mazu mumikuku.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kulumbununa mazu chapwa chuma chakumanyi ize muthu eji kuhana lumbunwiso yamazu kaha nalilingiso lyamazu nanavuluka.

sub_topics.title: Kutanga Chakujimina (Intensive Reading)
competences: Kutanga nakwivwishisa mujimbu kweseka naseteko yavo

instructional_blocks.hook: Lweza valongi vatange chimbwa chamujimbu washiwashi. Hula valongi vihula kweseka nachimbwa vanatange
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vatange mijimbu chipwe mikanda yaseteko yavo
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula vyakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi kuhihisa mujimbu
Alweze valongi vasononone mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Vatange vimbwa vyamujimbu. Vakumbulula vihula vyakulihandununa. Valihilise chipwe kusononona mijimbu. Vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu.

sub_topics.short_notes: KUMYAKA YAKUNYIMA: Kumyaka yakunyima vathu vanashimutwilanga navathu vakwakusuku mujijila jekha najekha, mumafuchi amavulu. Vathu vanazachisanga jijila jakulihandununa jakutuminangamo mijimbu.

sub_topics.title: Kutanga Chakutanduuka (Extensive Reading)

teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mikanda yakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi vasononone mujimbu vanatange mukuhanjika
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Valongi vatange mikanda yaseteko yavo yakulihandununa. Kuhihisa mujimbu vanatange mukuhanjika.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kutanga chakutanduuka chapwa kutanga mikanda yayinene yakulihandununa mangana longi ahase kupwa nachinyingi chakumanya nakukumbulula hakulita.

questions: Valongi vatange mijimbu yakulisezaseza mujila yakutesamo
Valongi vahihise mijimbu vanatange mukuhanjika mujila yakutesamo

sub_topics.title: Kuhihisa mujimbu muchimbwa (Summarizing in a paragraph)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hana mapapilo amujimbu kuli valongi vatange kaha vawaneho mutwe wachihande
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile tuthachikijilo twamujimbu muchimbwa
Alweze valongi vatombole mazu amalemu ali mumujimbu wakusoneka
Alweze valongi kuhihisa mujimbu muchimbwa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Zamikisa mwakusonekela vimbwa vyamazu. Lweza valongi vasoneke vimbwa muwihi. Lweza valongi kusononona vimbwa.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kuhihisa mujimbu muchimbwa chapwa chuma chakumanyi ize muthu eji kutongolanga vyuma vyavivene vili mumujimbu nakuvihihisanga muchimbwa chimwe shipwe vimbwa vyechi.

questions: Hula valongi kushimutwila tuthachikijilo mwakuhihishila chamijimbu muchimbwa
Valongi vatombole visonejeka vyavilemu na kuvihihisa muchimbwa

sub_topics.title: Miyachi Ya Tujina (Types of Pronouns)

instructional_blocks.hook: Kachopo ikhiye evanga kasumbi ka Nyakayombo. Lizu lya 'ikhiye' linemanyina chuma muka?
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso nazachiso yatujina
Lweza valongi vatombole miyachi yatujina vejiva
Alweze valongi vazachise miyachi yatujina vakulihandununa mumikuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kajina muthu: lyapwa lizu lyeji kwiminyinangako lijina lyamuthu. Chinjikizo: ikhiye, vakhiko, tukhiko. Kajina Panjiko: Lyapwa lizu lyemanyinako vyuma vyapandama kuli mwenyavyo. Chinjikizo: Chami, chenyi, chavo. Kajina Inyikiso: Lyapwa lizu lyeji kwinyikanga chuma chipwe vyuma. Chinjikizo: Ou, uze, ovo

sub_topics.short_notes: Tujina twapwa mazu aze tweji kuzachisanga mushipwe lya majina. Tukwechi miyachi itatu: Kajina muthu (personal pronoun), Kajina panjiko (possessive pronoun), Kajina inyikiso (demonstrative pronoun).

questions: Vashimutwile lumbunwiso nazachiso yatujina mujila yakwoloka
Vazachise miyachi yatujina vakulisezaseza mukutunga mikuku

sub_topics.title: Vishimo (Similes)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vatongole vishimo vejiva nakuvilumbununa
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso nazachiso yavishimo
Alweze valongi vahandunune vishimo kweseka nauhashi wazachiso yacho
Alweze valongi vatombole vishimo vyakwoloka vize vyatela kuzachisa mujila jakulisezaseza
Alweze valongi vatombole jijila jakwoloka jakutela kuzachishilamo vishimo vimwe
learner_steps: Vahandunune vishimo kweseka nauhashi wazachiso yacho
Vatombole vishimo vyakwoloka vize vyatela kuzachisa mujila jakulisezaseza
Vatombole jijila jakwoloka jakutela kuzachishilamo vishimo vimwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Vashimutwile lumbunwiso ya vishimo na zachiso yacho. Vahandunune vishimo kweseka na uhashi nazachiso yacho. Vatombole vishimo. Vatombole jijila jakwoloka muze jatelela kujizachishilamo.

sub_topics.short_notes: Vishimo vyapwa hanjikiso yakujimina ize veji kulumbununanga vyuma vivali vize nge vyaliwana vyakuzeneka kulihandununa. Vishimo veji kuzachisanga mazu aze afu nge 'nge' chipwe 'nawa'.

questions: Valongi navatombola nakuhandununa na kweseka na uhashi nazachiso yacho

sub_topics.title: Chivwasano (Dialogue)
competences: Zachisa lilimi lyakwoloka nakushimutwila havyuma vinakusefuka mungalila (Chiyulo)

instructional_blocks.hook: Chihandwa muka chili mukachi kachiyulo chavamyangana nachiyulo chafulumende?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile khala chihande
Alweze valongi vambulule vyuma vanawane
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kulivwasana (Dialogue) chapwa kushimutwila chavathu vavali chipwe mazavu avathu avali. Kushimutwila (Conversation) chapwa kuhanjika mukachi kavathu vavali chipwe vavavulu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Chiyulo chinapu jila imwe ize yakuyulilamo vathu. Chiyulo cheji kusolokanga kuzuvo yamuthu, kumashikola, nakumilimo ikwavo yafulumende. Chinahase kupwa chiyulo chamwaza chipwe chachipi.

questions: Hula valongi vambulule vyuma vanawane mukushimutwila chavo

sub_topics.title: Lumbunwiso Yamazu (Word Meanings - Governance Context)

instructional_blocks.hook: Lijina lyamatemo lyalumbunuka ika?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile halumbunwiso yamazu akusakula
Alweze valongi vahane lumbunwiso yamazu
Alweze valongi vazachise mazu vanasakula mumikuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lumbunwiso yamajina mu luvale: Muchisemwa cha luvale mwatwama majina amavulu vechi kuzachisanga vathu, kaha majina khana awa akwechi jilumbunwiso.

sub_topics.short_notes: Majina akulembununa hachiyulo: Kusesa - Kuze kwaliwanyina chana namusenge, Thangu - Ishi wakavanga kukwata muliyanga chipwe kwoza muchichelo hawalilo, Jimbu - Mujimbu wakufwa, Matemo - Mali chipwe vimuna eji kufwetanga kauko kuli vakaphwevo, Lisano - Phwevo lya mwangana

questions: Hula valongi vashimutwile hamajina akwechi lumbunwiso mu luvale
Hula valongi vazachise majina nakutunga mikuku

sub_topics.title: Kutanga nakwivwishisa - KUSEMA
competences: Kutanga nakwivwishisa mikanda yakulihandununa kweseka naseteko yavo

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vavuluke vyuma vatela kukavangiza navyuma kavetela kulingako nge vali nakutanga?
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vatange mujimbu
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula vyakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vasononone mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: KUSEMA: Kusema chapwa chachilemu kweseka nachisemwa cha luvale. Oloze mama lelo tunawane nge vathu vamwe vanachituchila shimbu kanda vahete nahaseteko yakumona ngwavo vanahase kulela uze mwana chipwe vaze vana.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kusema kachapwa chuma chakulahila kuli muthuko mwomwo mwana eji kutondewanga vyuma vyavivulu kufuma hakusemuka chenyi swi-i nomu mwaheta haseteko yakulimanyina. Muthu nahase kusema nakulela mwana chipwe vana shina uze nathachikiza jijila jamwenemwene jakuwanynamo jimbongo.

questions: Kumbulula vihula vyamiyachi yakulihandununa kufuma hamujimbu
Hula valongi vambulule mujimbu vanatange muwihi

sub_topics.title: Otombayongilafu (Autobiography)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula longi ambulule chiyoyelo chenyi mulwola lwalundende
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twa otombayongilafu
Alweze valongi kwambululu otombayongilafu mukuhanjika
Alweze valongi kusoneka otombayongilafu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Otombayongilafu chapwa chaulo chakusoneka chiyoyelo chamuthu kuli yavene. Kuzachisa tujina twakuvuluka muthu livene uze nakusoneka chaulo chize twakufwana nge, ngwa-, yami, ami. Kusoneka chiyoyelo kuputuka navyuma vyalivangile nakukumisa navyamakumishilo.

sub_topics.short_notes: Walo: Mutwe wachihande(kusoneka lijina lyove muvasona vavanene), Kujimbula: lijimbule yoveya kaha namwomwo ika unakusonekela hachiyoyelo chove, Unyike: kusemuka chove, thanga yove nachiyoyelo chaunyike, Shikola: mashikola watangililileko, masepa jove vahamuchima, milongeshi vakutangishile najindongi wazangile chikuma, Maukalu navyuma wahashile, Kukhukulula: vuluka vyuma walinangula muchiyoyelo chove navyuma wakufwila kulinga kulutwe.

sub_topics.title: Miyachi yajilingiso (Types of Adverbs)

instructional_blocks.hook: Mama angulwezanga kuhiluka kwimbo washi. Lizu muka mumukuku omu linemanyinako lingiso?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kulumbununa lumbunwiso namilimo yajilingiso
Alweze valongi kutombola miyachi yajilingiso (jilingiso jalwola, jilingiso jaseteko, jilingiso jasolokelo, jilingiso jamaphapa najilingiso jachihela)
Alweze valongi kuhandununa jilingiso kweseka namiyachi yajo
Alweze valongi kutunga mikuku kuzachisa miyachi yajilingiso
learner_steps: Vatombole miyachi yajiliingiso jakufwana nge (jilingiso jalwola, jilingiso jaseteko, jilingiso jasolokelo, jilingiso jamaphapa najilingiso jachihela)
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lingiso: Lyapwa lizu lyeji kutuhananga unjiho wauvulu halingo, kalumbunwiso chipwe lingiso ikwavo. Tukwechi miyachi yajilingiso yakufwana nge jilingiso jalwola, jilingiso jaseteko, jilingiso jasolokelo, jilingiso jamaphapa najilingiso jachihela.

sub_topics.short_notes: Jilingiso jalwola: Jechi kutulweza lwola nachisolokela chipwe kulingiwa chuma. Jilingiso jaseteko: Jechi kulumbununaomu chuma nachilingiwa. Jilingiso jasolokelo: Jechi kulumbununa omu cheji kusolokelangamo chuma. Jilingilo jamaphapa: japwa jakusolola kuvula chipwe maphapa nachingiwa chuma. Jilingiso jachihela: Jechi kwinyika okwo kunalingiwila chuma chipwe kunasolokela vyuma.

questions: Vatunge mikuku kuzachisa miyachi yajilingiso yakulisezaseza

sub_topics.title: Tushimutwiji (Riddles/Proverbs)

instructional_blocks.hook: Tuswovo? Vakupepa! Zuvo yamujingulule?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vahanjike nakukumbulula tushimutwiji
Alweze valongi vatunge tushimutwiji vavahya
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Tushimutwiji twapwa tushilikilo tweji kusakiwanga muthu shina ashinganyeke numba ahase kuwana kumbulwilo yakwoloka kaha halwola lwolumwe nawa tweji kuneha viseke.

sub_topics.short_notes: Tushimutwiji: Tushimutwiji twapwa tushilikilo tweji kusakiwanga muthu shina ashinganyeke numba ahase kuwana kumbulwilo yakwoloka kaha halwola lwolumwe nawa tweji kuneha viseke. Tushilikilo twapwa twatulemu mwomwo tweji kulingisa longi kushinganyeka washi nakupanjika unjiho umwe kuvyuma vikwavo.

sub_topics.title: Vijiviso Na Mivwimbimbi (Notices and Posters)

teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo wavijiviso namivwimbimbi
Alweze valongi vashimutwile haulemu wavijiviso namivwimbimbi
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Vijiviso namivwimbimbi: Vyapwa vyuma vize navasoneka mangana vihase kwijivisa, kukoka, kwanukisa vathu havyuma vyavilemu vize navasaka vathu vathachikize.

sub_topics.short_notes: Walo wavijiviso namivwimbimbi: Vijiviso - Kwijivisa nakalemesa, Mazu amashi kutanga, Kalwola kakandende, Lizavu lyavathu vamwe. Mivwimbimbi - Kukoka nakushinjiza, Navazachisa ulombo wakwepwisa muchima, Yinahase tuhu kushimbula, Likungumbuwa.

questions: Valongi vasoneke vijiviso namivwimbimbi kuzachisa walo wakwoloka

sub_topics.title: Inyikiso (Locatives)

instructional_blocks.hook: Soneka mukuku halivaya hula valongi vautange nakuwana lizu lya inyikiso mumukuku khana
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumbunune inyikiso namwakuyizachishila
Alweze valongi vawane jinyikiso mumikuku namumijimbu
Alweze valongi vazachise jinyikiso mumikuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Inyikiso: Awa apwa mazu eji kutulwezanga chihela chipwe mutamba kunapandama chuma chipwe muthu (ha-, mu-, ku-)

sub_topics.short_notes: Vinjikizo: Nathu nayi kuwatopa. Mukanda wove uli hamesa. Shima yenyi ili mundeho.

sub_topics.title: Myaso yachisemwa (Traditional Songs)

instructional_blocks.hook: Myaso yachisemwa yalemena haka?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumbunune ulemu wamyaso yachisemwa
Alweze valongi vahunanane hakutangisa myaso yachisemwa
Alweze valongi vembenga myaso yachisemwa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Myaso yachisemwa yapwa myaso ize yeji kwambululanga mijimbu yakukundama kuchiyoyelo chamuthu, zangi namijimbu yakunyima. Kulema chamyaso yachisemwa: Yeji kulamanga mijimbu, Yeji kununganga vathu nakulitambasana mijimbu, Kulamanga chisemwa chavathu mangana vakachizachise kulutwe.

sub_topics.short_notes: Valuvale vapwa vathu vamwe vazanga kwimba myaso yachisemwa chikuma. Myaso yapwa yayilemu chikuma mukuyoya chamuthu. Myaso eyi yeji kutangisanga vanyike chipwe vakulwane hamitwe yavihande vyakulihandununa chikuma.

sub_topics.title: Myangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku (Short and Long Vowels)
competences: Kuwana lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka nakusuhwa cha myangana javasona

instructional_blocks.hook: Lweza valongi kutanga vasonavumo ava: na ne ni no nu. Hula valongi vasolole myangana javasona muli vasonavumo unavahane
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi kuhandununa lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka namyangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku
Alweze valongi kuhana vinjikizo vyamazu amyangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku
learner_steps: Vahandununa lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka namyangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku
Vahane vinjikizo vyamazu amyangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Myangana javasona vavehi: Vapwa vasona vaze veji kuhanjikanga chipwe kutanganga mukalwola kakandende kaha. Mu Luvale myangana javasona vavehi vapwa: A E I O U. Myangana javasona vavasuku: Vapwa myangana javasona vaze veji kutanganga halwola lwalusuku kuhambakana myangana javasona vavehi.

sub_topics.short_notes: Vinjikizo: Meya, Kuka (vavehi). Kuumba, Kutanduuka, Tatee!, Mamee! (vavasuku)

questions: Kuhandununa lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka namyangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku
Kuhana vinjikizo vyamazu vya myangana javasona vavehi nava vavasuku

sub_topics.title: Chaulo chakulumbununa (Descriptive Composition)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vavuluke masepa javo vahamuchima. Hulaho jino umwe alumbunune kupwa chasepa lyenyi
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulumbununa vyuma
Alweze valongi kusoneka chaulo chakulumbununa
learner_steps: Vashimutwile walo natuthachikilo twachaulo chakulumbununa vyuma
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Chaulo chakulumbununa chapwa kusoneka chize cheji kutalanga hakujimbula chuma mangana owo mwatanga ahase kuhaka ovyo vanakulumbununa muvishinganyeka vyenyi.

sub_topics.short_notes: Walo wakulumbununa vyuma: Muchimbwa 1: Kujimbula: Soneka lijina lyamuthu wakulumbununa, apwa lunga tahi nyi phwevo, myaka yakusemuka nalifuchi apandamako. Chimbwa 2: Mujimbu uvene: Lumbununa vyuma navahasa kumona vathu nameso hali muthu uze wakulumbununa (kusuhwa, kutohwa, kulava…). Chimbwa 3: Unjiho washikola yenyi yayindende nashikola yayinene. Chimbwa 4: Vilinga vyenyi. Chimbwa 5: Kukhukulula: Soneka kufwila chove hali muthu ou

sub_topics.title: Chivwasano - Kusekasana
competences: Zachisa lilimi lyakwoloka nakushimutwila havyuma vinakusefuka mungalila (kusekasana)

instructional_blocks.hook: Kuhula valongi jijila muka veji kuwanyinangamo mali?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile khala chihande hakusekasana
Alweze valongi vambulule vyuma vanashimutwila
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kulivwasana chapwa kushimutwila chavathu vavali chipwe mazavu avathu avali. Kushimutwila chapwa kuhanjika mukachi kavathu vavali chipwe vavavulu.

sub_topics.short_notes: Kusekasana: Omu chihande chivene muli vyavivulu valongi navaya nakulingulula. Muli kulinangula mwakutachikijila kusekasana kaha nawa tuvihande twatundende twakufwana nge kwivwilila nakuhanjika, kutanga, kusoneka, mwaya lilimi nakwalumuna mujimbu chipwe mikuku nakashishi.

questions: Hula valongi vambulule vyuma vanawane mukushimutwila chavo

sub_topics.title: Lumbunwiso Yamazu - Mazu akujimina

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi valumbunune lizu nyambaulu
teacher_steps: Ahane mazu kuli valongi
Alweze valongi kushimutwila lumbunwiso yamazu akusakula
Alweze valongi kwambulula lumbunwiso yamazu
Alweze valongi kuzachisa mazu akusakula mumikuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kuhanjika chakujimina: Vathu hamwe nahamwe veji kuzachisanga hanjikiso yakujimina oloze yeji kulumbununa lizu limwe. Chinjikizo: Livoko mbe lyasala – kusalisa, Kukwata mukanwa – kulya shima

sub_topics.short_notes: Mazu akujimina apwa mazu aze veji kulumbununa vyuma vikwavo kuzachisa mazu akujimina akulevana namazu vakuzachisa muchalo chavo.

sub_topics.title: Kutanga Chakujimina - KUSEKASANA
competences: Kutanga mijimbu yakulisezaseza nakwivwishisa kweseka naseteko yavo

instructional_blocks.hook: Kutanga chimbwa chamazu kaha valongi vashimutwileho nakuwana chihande chivene
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mijimbu
Alweze valongi vakumbulule vihula vyakulisezaseza
Alweze valongi vahihise mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vasononone mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Hamwaka walisolo nazala, maphwevo namalunga vamangana chikuma vapwile navishinganyeka vyakuwanyina mwakuyoyela. Vathu vekha vathutukilenga nakuya nakutunga membo kujingalila jeka kushinganyeka nge navawana vyakulya.

sub_topics.short_notes: Maukalu eka ejikwizanga mwomwo yachanga cheji kumisanga vimbuto. Hekha nawa nge livaji linatoho, meya eji kwenyekanga vimbuto navyakulya vikwavo vyeji kwingilanga mumbwimbwi. Maphwevo vamwe veji kupwanga navishinganyeka vyakulima mande amanene alupa, chivwale na vyelu.

questions: Kumbulula vihula vyamiyachi yakulisezaseza kufuma hamujimbu
Hula valongi vambulule mujimbu vanatange muwihi
Valongi vasoneke mazu alifwana lumbunwiso namazu vanawane mumujimbu

sub_topics.title: Kulava Jinambala (Counting Numbers)
competences: Kulava kufuma kuchuma chimwe nakuheta kutununu

instructional_blocks.hook: Kuhula valongi vyuma muka vanahase kuzachisa mukulava
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valave jinambala kufuma kuchuma chimwe nakuheta kutununu mu Luvale
learner_steps: Vatela kulava jinambala kufuma kuchuma chimwe nakuheta kutununu mu Luvale
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kulweza valongi jinambala jajinene makumi, makulukaji, makombakaji natununu. Vinjikizo: 10 – Likumi, 100 – Likhulukaji, 1000 –likhombakaji, 1,000,000 - Kanunu

sub_topics.short_notes: Kulava jinambala mu Luvale: 10 – Likumi, 100 – Likhulukaji, 1000 –likhombakaji, 1,000,000 - Kanunu
